title: Add Web build and release-gate harness
summary: Create the repeatable Web product-gate build and harness for the current alpha content framework without changing simulation authority.
acceptance: Web build has a repeatable release-gate command or documented harness
Harness runs against real M5/M4-derived vertical-slice content, not an empty map
Chrome and Edge target assumptions are recorded
Build strategy records bundle-size, asset and cross-origin-isolation assumptions
UI, Pixi and React remain read-model consumers and do not become simulation authority

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until WM-0085 is verified and done.

Added Web product-gate harness with 192x192 deterministic M5/M4-derived fixture, build-time release-gate report, recorded Chrome/Edge and COI/SAB assumptions, and read-only HUD/debug evidence; required checks passed: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

changes_requested: High: pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell rewrites tracked coordination/artifacts/WM-0003/web-shell-smoke.png from the hardcoded screenshot path in apps/web/src/web-shell.e2e.test.ts, outside WM-0086 allowed paths and requiring manual generated-output cleanup after a required gate. Build report artifact is ignored and other required checks passed.

Repaired WM-0086 review finding by moving web-shell e2e screenshots to WM_ARTIFACT_DIR or os.tmpdir()/wuming-town/WM-0086, restoring the accidental WM-0003 tracked artifact change, and updating the report to record clean screenshot behavior; required checks passed again: pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

verified: No blocking findings. Repaired web-shell e2e screenshot path writes to WM_ARTIFACT_DIR or os.tmpdir()/wuming-town/WM-0086 and no longer modifies tracked coordination/artifacts/WM-0003/web-shell-smoke.png; pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate and git diff --check passed; scope remains Web harness only with WM-0087+ gates deferred.
Integrated verified Web build and release-gate harness after independent review confirmed the WM-0003 screenshot artifact is no longer modified and scope remains Web product-gate harness only.

objective: Add the Web build and product-gate harness needed for later browser performance, storage and SharedArrayBuffer gates.
forbiddenPaths: M7 store or public playtest material
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: harness proves shell behavior but not product gate scale.
Risk: Web build requires a new dependency or hosting assumption.
File ownership is limited to Web app, UI/renderer/platform Web surfaces and docs.
ownerGate: Block on new runtime dependency, public protocol change or server requirement
Block if Web harness uses empty-world evidence
m0M5RegressionCoverage: M5 alpha content must remain product-gate fixture basis
benchmarkImpact: Defines future Web release-gate harness evidence; no benchmark threshold weakening.
reviewRouting: client-engineer completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies Web harness scope and authority boundaries.
rollbackModel: Revert Web harness/build changes and docs; later M6 Web evidence tasks remain proposed.

sparkEligibility.reason: Web product-gate harness spans app, renderer/platform surfaces and M6 product readiness.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Repaired web-shell e2e screenshot path writes to WM_ARTIFACT_DIR or os.tmpdir()/wuming-town/WM-0086 and no longer modifies tracked coordination/artifacts/WM-0003/web-shell-smoke.png; pnpm typecheck, pnpm build:web, pnpm test:e2e --filter web-shell, taskctl validate and git diff --check passed; scope remains Web harness only with WM-0087+ gates deferred.

integration.summary: Integrated verified Web build and release-gate harness after independent review confirmed the WM-0003 screenshot artifact is no longer modified and scope remains Web product-gate harness only.
